name: maw

scripts.dev:
pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs && echo '→ maw backend (watch src/) on :3456
→ maw-dev vite HMR on :5173
→ pm2 logs to follow'
scripts.dev:stop: pm2 delete maw maw-dev 2>/dev/null; echo '→ dev stopped'
scripts.deploy: bun install && bun run build:office && pm2 delete maw-dev 2>/dev/null; pm2 restart maw
scripts.deploy:remote: bun run build:office && rsync -az dist-office/ white.local:~/Code/github.com/Soul-Brews-Studio/maw-js/dist-office/ && rsync -az dist-8bit-office/ white.local:~/Code/github.com/Soul-Brews-Studio/maw-js/dist-8bit-office/ && rsync -az src/ white.local:~/Code/github.com/Soul-Brews-Studio/maw-js/src/ && ssh white.local 'export PATH=$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH && pm2 restart maw' && echo '→ deployed to white.local:3456'

description: maw.js — Multi-Agent Workflow in Bun/TS. Remote tmux orchestra control. CLI + Web UI.
